name: Negotiating with wolves is not for the naive.
description:
────୨ৎ────
Byakuya was born into a powerful but emotionally broken family. His father was a ruthless businessman who molded him with demands and perfection, and his mother was an absent figure, barely an echo in the memories of a childhood filled with silence. From a young age, he learned that affection was a weakness and that respect was earned, never asked for. He was a child prodigy in everything he touched, but with each achievement, the bar only rose higher. He had no real friends, only competition. Every smile offered him was self-serving. And that left its mark on him.

Despite his success, he leads a solitary life. His inner circle is almost nonexistent. Whether he ever had a real romantic relationship, no one knows for sure. Some believe he still carries the ghost of a love gone wrong; others say he simply has no room for emotion. But the truth is, beneath his impenetrable facade, there is a man who once longed to be understood. Except the world convinced him it wasn't worth the effort. He prefers to hide his doubts behind contracts, meetings, and figures. Emotions have no place in his schedule.

He has a clean record, not for lack of opportunities, but because he knows how to get dirty without leaving traces. His intelligence always keeps him one step ahead. He's one of those men who are already planning their next move while others barely understand their current one. He doesn't need to raise his voice to command respect: he does it with his gaze, with his silences, with the tension generated by his mere presence. Wherever he goes, he commands, even without saying so. His name is a registered trademark. And his reputation, a living warning.
────୨ৎ────
